author: codex-duplication-audit

patch.value: Deduplicate Beads and Todos package adapter runtimes

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: jscpd found packages/pm-beads and packages/pm-todos duplicate both extension command metadata and runtime adapter logic. Index clones include beads/index.ts:34-59 vs todos/index.ts:36-61 and beads/index.ts:60-81 vs todos/index.ts:62-83. Runtime clones include beads/runtime.ts:102-118 vs todos/runtime.ts:96-112, beads/runtime.ts:121-137 vs todos/runtime.ts:116-132, beads/runtime.ts:148-165 vs todos/runtime.ts:221-238, and beads/runtime.ts:452-469 vs todos/runtime.ts:260-277. Existing pm-y5u0 covers generic runtime option readers, but this is a separate import/export adapter pattern duplication. Fix by extracting shared package adapter primitives for external-source item mapping, command contract shape, conflict/result rendering, and dry-run/import counters.

Beads and Todos packages share common adapter/runtime helpers for repeated command metadata, source mapping, import counters, and result rendering; package-specific field mapping remains explicit; beads/todos unit tests and package smoke coverage pass; pnpm build passes.

message: Create beads/todos duplication finding after duplicate-check search

value.author: package-dedup-agent
value.text: Approach (dedup agent): Same shared-surface strategy as pm-y5u0 — the only module bundled packages may import is the SDK runtime (loaded via PM_CLI_PACKAGE_ROOT -> dist/sdk/runtime.js), enforced by tests/unit/package-manifest.spec.ts which bans ../../../../{src,dist}/{core,types}/ imports. RUNTIME dedup (primary target, the cited clone lines): extracted behavior-identical value coercers + the item write/commit sequence into src/sdk/package-import-adapters.ts (new), re-exported from src/sdk/runtime.ts: toNonEmptyImportString, toEstimatedMinutesValue, toImportPriority, toImportTags, toImportStatus, selectImportAuthor, ensureTrackerInitialized, emptyImportedDocument, and commitImportedItem (acquireLock->writeFileAtomic->createHistoryEntry->appendHistoryEntry->onWrite hooks; CONFLICT returns a caller-prefixed warning, other errors removeFileIfExists+rethrow). beads/todos keep their PACKAGE-SPECIFIC mappings explicit: beads toIsoString uses isTimestampLiteral (strict) while todos uses Date.parse (lenient); toItemType differs (beads hardcoded vocab vs todos typeNames); todos confidence/enum/boolean coercers stay local. Each package aliases the shared helpers (const toNonEmptyString = toNonEmptyImportString) to keep call sites unchanged. INDEX dedup: ATTEMPTED to extract the resolvePackageRootCandidates/loadRuntimeModule loader into the SDK, but REVERTED — index.js is deliberately SDK-free so it can be copied into the pm root on install; adding a static 'import from ../../../../dist/sdk/index.js' breaks because the relative dist path is wrong once the package is copied to <pmRoot>/extensions/<name>/ (verified: install then run = unknown_command). The index loader bootstrap therefore stays duplicated by necessity (it must resolve runtime.js WITHOUT the SDK). Mirrored every .ts edit into the .js twin.

value.author: package-dedup-agent
value.text: DONE. Shared module: src/sdk/package-import-adapters.ts (new) — toNonEmptyImportString, toEstimatedMinutesValue, toImportPriority, toImportTags, toImportStatus, selectImportAuthor, ensureTrackerInitialized, emptyImportedDocument, commitImportedItem (+ CommitImportedItemParams/Result types); re-exported from src/sdk/runtime.ts. Files changed (.ts AND .js twins): packages/pm-beads/extensions/beads/runtime.{ts,js}; packages/pm-todos/extensions/todos/runtime.{ts,js}; src/sdk/runtime.ts (+re-export); vitest.config.ts (include new file). New: src/sdk/package-import-adapters.ts; tests/unit/package-import-adapters.spec.ts (full branch coverage incl. commit happy-path + lock-conflict). Net -378 LOC across beads/todos runtime files. Package-specific field mapping kept explicit (beads strict isTimestampLiteral vs todos lenient Date.parse; toItemType; confidence/enum/boolean coercers). Reused pm-y5u0 SDK-surface strategy. INDEX loader dedup deferred to pm-wwa7 (extracting it to the SDK breaks copied/installed packages because index.js must stay SDK-import-free). Tests: pnpm build + pnpm typecheck (packages incl) green; beads-command + todos-extension + builtin-extension-entrypoints + package-manifest + package-import-adapters + package-runtime-options (all pass); full coverage gate 1730/1731 with NO coverage-threshold errors (new SDK files at 100%); e2e via node dist/cli.js verified: beads import 13/13 then re-import skips 13 (item_exists), todos export 13 then import 13 into fresh tracker. Sole failing test (release-readiness files JSON key order) is pre-existing from the prior agent's files.ts refactor, unrelated to this work.

patch.value: Extracted shared Beads/Todos import adapter primitives into src/sdk/package-import-adapters.ts (value coercers + commitImportedItem write/lock/history sequence), re-exported via the SDK runtime surface both packages already load through PM_CLI_PACKAGE_ROOT. beads/todos runtime.ts and .js twins now reuse them while keeping package-specific field mapping explicit; net -378 LOC. Index.ts package-runtime loader dedup was attempted but reverted (it would break copied/installed packages, which require index.js to stay SDK-import-free) and deferred to pm-wwa7. Zero behavior change verified via build, typecheck, package+integration tests, full coverage gate (no threshold regressions), and e2e import/export round-trip.
Extracted shared Beads/Todos package adapter runtime primitives while preserving package-specific mapping.
Beads and Todos adapters share import commit/coercion code without losing import/export behavior.
src/sdk/package-import-adapters.ts is covered at 100 percent including cleanup failure paths, manual temp package smoke passed, and full release gate passed.
